name: Baldur Shell
effect: Protects the Knight while focusing, blocking up to four hits.
description: A baldur shell sprouts over the Knight's head during Focus. The shell breaks after blocking four hits and regenerates at a bench.
location: Howling Cliffs — found in a baldur skull, requires the Mothwing Cloak to reach.
summary: Blocks damage while focusing. Shatters after four hits.

name: Carefree Melody
effect: Hums a charmed tune that occasionally nullifies incoming damage.
description: Each incoming hit has a ~20% chance to be cancelled entirely. Replaces Grimmchild if the Knight chooses the Banishment route in the Grimm Troupe questline.
location: Brumm in Dirtmouth, after Banishing the Grimm Troupe with his unbreathed accordion.
summary: 20% damage cancel. The Banishment-route alternative to Grimmchild.

name: Dashmaster
effect: Reduces the cooldown of the dash and enables a downward dash.
description: Shortens dash cooldown from 0.6 to 0.4 seconds and unlocks a vertical down-dash. Essential for speedruns and precision platforming.
location: Royal Waterways — behind a hidden wall near the dung pool, requires Mantis Claw to reach.
summary: Faster, longer dashes and a new down-dash. Heavy synergy with Sharp Shadow.

name: Deep Focus
effect: Focus heals twice as much, but takes longer.
description: Each Focus restores two masks instead of one but takes ~50% longer to channel. Excellent in survival builds with Quick Focus or Baldur Shell.
location: Crystal Peak — behind a Simple Key-locked door in the Deep Focus Cavern.
summary: Heals 2 masks per Focus, but slower.

name: Defender's Crest
effect: Releases a constant cloud of foul-smelling dung that damages enemies.
description: Surrounds the Knight in a poison cloud and modifies Vengeful Spirit, Howling Wraiths, Desolate Dive, and Flukenest to deal lingering poison damage.
location: Royal Waterways — Dung Defender's reward after defeating him in his pit.
summary: Permanent damage aura. The cornerstone of every poison build.

name: Dream Wielder
effect: Dream Nail charges faster and harvests more SOUL from dreaming enemies.
description: Cuts Dream Nail charge time by ~25% and increases SOUL drain on enemies. A budget pick for late-game dream essence farming.
location: Awarded by the Seer in Spirit's Glade after collecting 500 dream essence.
summary: Faster Dream Nail and more SOUL on dream strikes.

name: Dreamshield
effect: A shield orbits the Knight, blocking projectiles and damaging enemies.
description: Spins a small protective shield around the Knight. Blocks small projectiles and deals minor contact damage; pauses when Focusing.
location: Resting Grounds — behind a hidden wall in the lower section, requires Desolate Dive.
summary: Orbiting shield. Blocks projectiles, chips enemies.

name: Flukenest
effect: Replaces Vengeful Spirit with a swarm of flukes.
description: Transforms the projectile spells into homing fluke larvae. Damage drops nominally but skyrockets when combined with Defender's Crest.
location: Royal Waterways — reward for defeating Flukemarm in her hidden chamber.
summary: Flukenest swaps your fireball for homing flukes. Synergizes hard with Defender's Crest.

name: Fragile Greed
effect: Enemies drop 20% more geo. Breaks on death.
description: All enemy geo drops are multiplied by 1.2. Shatters when the Knight dies, like all of Leg Eater's fragile line.
location: Leg Eater's hut in the Fungal Wastes.
summary: +20% enemy geo drops. Breaks on death.

name: Fragile Heart
effect: Increases health by 2 masks. Breaks on death.
description: Adds two empty masks to the lifebar. Shatters when the Knight dies, requiring a return to Leg Eater (or Divine in the Grimm Troupe) to re-buy.
location: Leg Eater's hut in the Fungal Wastes, near the southern Mantis tunnels.
summary: +2 masks. Breaks on death until upgraded to Unbreakable Heart.

name: Fragile Strength
effect: Increases nail damage by 50%. Breaks on death.
description: +50% multiplier to all melee nail damage. Stacks multiplicatively with other damage modifiers and is the single biggest damage charm in the game.
location: Leg Eater's hut in the Fungal Wastes.
summary: +50% nail damage. Breaks on death.

name: Fury of the Fallen
effect: Greatly increases nail damage when reduced to one mask.
description: +75% nail damage at exactly one mask of health. Risky but extraordinarily strong for skilled play.
location: King's Pass — found in an alcove above the cliffs, near the very start of the game.
summary: Damage spike at 1 HP. Pairs beautifully with Joni's Blessing.

name: Gathering Swarm
effect: A swarm of flies retrieves dropped geo for you.
description: Loose geo that scatters when the Knight takes damage is automatically pulled back. Most useful in early-game grinds.
location: Sly's shop in Dirtmouth.
summary: Recovers scattered geo automatically.

name: Glowing Womb
effect: Spawns small hatchlings that fight for the Knight.
description: Periodically births a hatchling that homes onto the nearest enemy. Each costs SOUL — combine with Soul Eater for a constant swarm.
location: Forgotten Crossroads — accessed from Crystal Peak via a Crystal Heart launch into a hidden chamber.
summary: Auto-summons hatchlings that attack for you, at SOUL cost.

name: Grimmchild
effect: Summons a Grimmchild that fights alongside the Knight.
description: An evolving companion charm. The Grimmchild grows into more dangerous forms as the Knight collects flames for the Grimm Troupe quest, ending at level 4.
location: Speak to Troupe Master Grimm in Dirtmouth, then complete the Ritual to grow the Grimmchild.
summary: Companion that grows as you progress the Grimm Troupe quest. Converts to Carefree Melody if you banish.

name: Grubberfly's Elegy
effect: While at full health, swinging the nail releases a beam of energy.
description: A horizontal projectile shoots out on every nail swing at max HP. The Knight loses the buff after a single hit. The endgame reward for rescuing every grub.
location: Grubfather's reward for rescuing all 46 grubs.
summary: Free ranged beams while at full HP. Spectacular at full Pure Nail damage.

name: Grubsong
effect: Recover SOUL each time the Knight takes damage.
description: Gain 10 SOUL per mask of damage taken. Trivializes Focus-based survival when paired with Quick Focus.
location: Grubfather's reward for rescuing 10 grubs across Hallownest.
summary: Heals SOUL on damage. Grubfather's first thank-you.

name: Heavy Blow
effect: Knocks enemies back further when struck.
description: Boosts horizontal knockback. Useful for pushing dangerous mobs off platforms or interrupting attack cycles.
location: Sly's shop in Dirtmouth — appears in his expanded inventory after the Shopkeeper's Key is delivered.
summary: Extra knockback on every nail hit.

name: Hiveblood
effect: Slowly regenerates the most recent mask of damage.
description: Every 10 seconds, the last damaged mask regenerates while standing still or moving. Doesn't help in combat windows but stretches expeditions.
location: The Hive — reward for defeating the Hive Knight.
summary: Slow auto-heal of one mask. Lifesaver in exploration.

name: Joni's Blessing
effect: Converts every white mask to a blue Lifeblood mask. Cannot Focus to heal.
description: Replaces the entire health bar with Lifeblood. The Knight can no longer heal mid-fight — only at benches.
location: Joni's Repose in the Howling Cliffs.
summary: Trades healing for one huge Lifeblood pool. The Joni's challenge.

name: Kingsoul
effect: Slowly generates SOUL while idle.
description: The reunited halves of the White Lady's and the Pale King's gifts. Quietly trickles SOUL into the meter. Required to access the Birthplace.
location: Reforged by collecting both Kingsoul halves: the Queen's Fragment from White Lady and the King's Fragment from the White Palace.
summary: Reunited royal charm. Trickles SOUL and unlocks the Abyss's deepest door.

name: Lifeblood Core
effect: Grants four extra blue Lifeblood masks at every bench.
description: Same as Lifeblood Heart but doubled. Stacks with Lifeblood Heart, Joni's Blessing, and various bench-side blue masks for a fat Lifeblood pool.
location: Abyss — in the Lifeblood Core chamber, requires Crystal Heart + Monarch Wings to reach.
summary: 4 free blue masks per bench. Stacks with Lifeblood Heart.

name: Lifeblood Heart
effect: Grants two extra blue Lifeblood masks at every bench.
description: Adds 2 Lifeblood (blue) masks that absorb damage before the regular health bar. Renewed by resting.
location: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.
summary: 2 free blue masks per bench. Cheap and reliable.

name: Longnail
effect: Increases the range of the Knight's nail.
description: +15% nail range. Stacks additively with Mark of Pride for the longest possible reach in the game.
location: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.
summary: +15% nail range. Stack with Mark of Pride for maximum reach.

name: Mark of Pride
effect: Increases the range of the Knight's nail even further.
description: +25% nail range, the largest single-charm reach buff. Stacks additively with Longnail.
location: Mantis Village — earned by defeating the Mantis Lords and being honored by the tribe.
summary: +25% nail range. Granted by the Mantis Lords.

name: Nailmaster's Glory
effect: Nail Arts charge twice as fast.
description: Halves Nail Art charge time. Required to make Great Slash and Cyclone Slash genuinely usable in combat.
location: Gifted by Sheo after the Knight learns all three Nail Arts (Cyclone Slash, Dash Slash, Great Slash).
summary: Cuts Nail Art charge in half. The dedicated nail-art enabler.

name: Quick Focus
effect: Focus heals the Knight faster.
description: Reduces the Focus animation from 1.83s to 1.33s. Lifesaver against the faster late-game bosses.
location: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.
summary: Faster Focus animation. Pairs naturally with Grubsong.

name: Quick Slash
effect: Strike with the nail much more rapidly.
description: Reduces the nail swing cooldown by ~0.25s, increasing damage-per-second by roughly 70%. The single strongest melee charm.
location: Kingdom's Edge — in a hidden room above the Whispering Root, accessible after Mantis Claw + Monarch Wings.
summary: Massive attack-speed buff. Best-in-slot for nail builds.

name: Shaman Stone
effect: Spells deal more damage and travel further.
description: +33% damage on Vengeful Spirit/Shade Soul, Howling Wraiths/Abyss Shriek, and Desolate Dive/Descending Dark. Backbone of any spellcaster build.
location: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.
summary: Massive spell-damage boost. Required for serious caster builds.

name: Shape of Unn
effect: Allows the Knight to slide while Focusing.
description: Lets the Knight slither during the Focus animation. Used to dodge boss attacks while healing — and to access a few platforming secrets.
location: Talk to the slug atop Lake of Unn in Greenpath after acquiring Isma's Tear.
summary: Move while focusing. Niche but elegant.

name: Sharp Shadow
effect: Shade Cloak dashes deal damage and travel further.
description: The Shade Cloak now damages enemies it passes through and lasts slightly longer. Combine with Dashmaster for a near-constant dash.
location: Deepnest — behind a fragile wall in the Failed Tramway, reached via Shade Cloak.
summary: Shade Cloak now damages enemies. Required for shade-cloak builds.

name: Soul Catcher
effect: More SOUL is gained when striking enemies with the nail.
description: +3 SOUL per nail hit on top of the base 11. Crucial for spell-heavy playstyles before Soul Eater.
location: Ancestral Mound — found in a chamber above the Snail Shaman's hut, behind a Husk Hornhead.
summary: Bumps SOUL gain per nail hit. Upgrades into Soul Eater.

name: Soul Eater
effect: Greatly increases SOUL gained from striking enemies.
description: Stronger version of Soul Catcher: +8 SOUL per hit on top of the base 11. Cannot be equipped at the same time as Soul Catcher.
location: Resting Grounds — found in a hidden alcove near the spirit Galien's grave.
summary: Soul Catcher's upgraded form. Almost mandatory for spellcasting.

name: Spell Twister
effect: Reduces the SOUL cost of casting spells.
description: Each spell costs 24 SOUL instead of 33, letting the Knight cast four spells from a full bar instead of three. Mandatory in caster builds.
location: Atop the Soul Sanctum tower, accessible after defeating the Soul Master.
summary: Spells cost 24 SOUL instead of 33. Foundational caster charm.

name: Spore Shroom
effect: Releases a damaging spore cloud while the Knight is focusing.
description: Triggers a small poison cloud every time the Knight Focuses to heal. Pairs with Defender's Crest for permanent stacked poison.
location: Fungal Wastes — found in a hidden alcove near the Mushroom Lord's grave site.
summary: Damaging spore cloud on every Focus.

name: Sprintmaster
effect: Increases the Knight's running speed.
description: +25% horizontal walk/run speed. Stackable with Dashmaster and Quick Slash for movement-focused builds.
location: Sly's shop in Dirtmouth — appears in his expanded inventory after the Shopkeeper's Key is delivered.
summary: Permanent ground-speed buff. Cheap and easy to slot.

name: Stalwart Shell
effect: Recover from damage more quickly.
description: Doubles the Knight's invincibility window after taking a hit. Pairs well with Quick Focus runs and aggressive playstyles.
location: Sly's shop in Dirtmouth.
summary: Extends invulnerability after a hit.

name: Steady Body
effect: Removes the recoil the Knight suffers when striking enemies.
description: Lets the Knight stand its ground while hitting tall foes or pogo targets. A favorite in tight platforming and Path of Pain runs.
location: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.
summary: No more recoil from nail strikes.

name: Thorns of Agony
effect: Sprouts thorns when the Knight is damaged, hurting nearby foes.
description: Deals 1 mask of damage to enemies adjacent to the Knight when struck. Cheap and useful for early-game crowds.
location: Greenpath — in a vine-bound chamber behind a thicket, accessible with the Mothwing Cloak.
summary: Damage attackers when you take a hit.

name: Unbreakable Greed
effect: Enemies drop 20% more geo. No longer breaks on death.
description: Permanent version of Fragile Greed, forged by Divine for 9,000 geo on top of the broken charm.
location: Divine's tent in Dirtmouth, after the Grimm Troupe arrives.
summary: Unbreakable +20% geo drops.

name: Unbreakable Heart
effect: Increases health by 2 masks. No longer breaks on death.
description: Permanent version of Fragile Heart. Requires Divine of the Grimm Troupe to forge — costs an additional 15,000 geo on top of the base charm.
location: Divine's tent in Dirtmouth, after the Grimm Troupe arrives.
summary: Fragile Heart's permanent form. 2 extra masks that survive death.

name: Unbreakable Strength
effect: Increases nail damage by 50%. No longer breaks on death.
description: Permanent version of Fragile Strength. Forged by Divine for an extra 15,000 geo on top of the broken charm.
location: Divine's tent in Dirtmouth, after the Grimm Troupe arrives.
summary: Unbreakable +50% nail damage. Most builds run this permanently.

name: Void Heart
effect: Unifies the Knight with the void. Cannot be unequipped; enables alternate endings.
description: Replaces the Kingsoul after taking it into the Birthplace at the bottom of the Abyss. Pacifies all Siblings and unlocks the Dream No More ending and the Pantheon of Hallownest.
location: Birthplace at the bottom of the Abyss, equipped automatically upon entry while wearing the Kingsoul.
summary: Forever-equipped soul charm that costs 0 notches. Required for the true ending.

name: Wayward Compass
effect: Reveals the Knight's location on the map.
description: Without this charm, the map only shows rooms — not where you are inside them. Often the first charm players buy.
location: Sly's shop in Dirtmouth.
summary: Adds the Knight's position to the map. Most players' first charm purchase.

name: Weaversong
effect: Spawns up to three weaverling allies that attack enemies.
description: Constantly maintains a trio of weaverling minions. They follow the Knight and deal nominal damage, but distract enemies remarkably well.
location: Weavers' Den, deep in Deepnest.
summary: Three permanent weaverling allies. No SOUL cost.
